class QTests(unittest.TestCase):

    def test_q_object_with_multiple_conditions_and(self):

        q2 = QueryQ(field2=Value('value2'))

        self.assertEqual(len(combined.children), 2)

    def test_negated_q_object(self):

        self.assertTrue(negated.negated)
        self.assertEqual(len(negated.children), 1)

    def test_empty_q_object_combination(self):
        q1 = QueryQ()
        q2 = QueryQ(field=Value('value'))
        combined = q1 & q2
        self.assertEqual(combined, q2)

        self.assertEqual(kwargs, {'field': Value('value')})
        self.assertEqual(args, ())

    def test_deconstruct_complex_q(self):
        q1 = QueryQ(field1=Value('value1'))
        q2 = QueryQ(field2=Value('value2'))
        combined = q1 & q2
        path, args, kwargs = combined.deconstruct()
        self.assertEqual(len(args), 2)
        self.assertEqual(kwargs, {'_connector': QueryQ.AND})

    def test_clone_operation(self):
        condition = QueryQ(field=Value('value'))
        fr = FilteredRelation('relation', condition=condition)
        fr.alias = 'alias'
        fr.path = ['path']
        cloned = fr.clone()
        self.assertEqual(cloned.relation_name, fr.relation_name)
        self.assertEqual(cloned.alias, fr.alias)
        self.assertEqual(cloned.path, fr.path)
        self.assertIsNot(cloned, fr)

class SubclassesTests(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_normal_case_with_simple_class_hierarchy(self):
        class Parent:
            pass
        class Child(Parent):
            pass
        result = list(subclasses(Parent))
        self.assertEqual(len(result), 2)
        self.assertIn(Parent, result)
        self.assertIn(Child, result)

    def test_deep_inheritance_hierarchy(self):
        class GrandParent:
            pass
        class Parent(GrandParent):
            pass
        class Child(Parent):
            pass
        result = list(subclasses(GrandParent))
        self.assertEqual(len(result), 3)
        self.assertIn(GrandParent, result)
        self.assertIn(Parent, result)
        self.assertIn(Child, result)

    def test_empty_case_no_subclasses(self):

class QTests(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_basic_q_object_creation_with_kwargs(self):
        q = QueryQ(field=Value('value'))
        self.assertEqual(len(q.children), 1)
        self.assertEqual(q.children[0][0], 'field')
        self.assertEqual(q.children[0][1], Value('value'))

    def test_q_object_with_multiple_conditions_and(self):
        q1 = QueryQ(field1=Value('value1'))
        q2 = QueryQ(field2=Value('value2'))
        combined = q1 & q2
        self.assertEqual(combined.connector, QueryQ.AND)
        self.assertEqual(len(combined.children), 2)

    def test_q_object_with_or_combination(self):
        q1 = QueryQ(field1=Value('value1'))
        q2 = QueryQ(field2=Value('value2'))
        combined = q1 | q2
        self.assertEqual(combined.connector, QueryQ.OR)
        self.assertEqual(len(combined.children), 2)

    def test_negated_q_object(self):
        q = QueryQ(field=Value('value'))
        negated = ~q
        self.assertTrue(negated.negated)
        self.assertEqual(len(negated.children), 1)

    def test_empty_q_object_combination(self):
        q1 = QueryQ()
        q2 = QueryQ(field=Value('value'))
        combined = q1 & q2
        self.assertEqual(combined, q2)

    def test_deconstruct_simple_q(self):
        q = QueryQ(field=Value('value'))
        path, args, kwargs = q.deconstruct()
        self.assertEqual(kwargs, {'field': Value('value')})
        self.assertEqual(args, ())

    def test_deconstruct_complex_q(self):
        q1 = QueryQ(field1=Value('value1'))
        q2 = QueryQ(field2=Value('value2'))
        combined = q1 & q2
        path, args, kwargs = combined.deconstruct()
        self.assertEqual(len(args), 2)
        self.assertEqual(kwargs, {'_connector': QueryQ.AND})
